spec.name: The Aqueduct
spec.description: You are in a massive stone structure that has been designed to channel water into the city of Rome. Due to the recent drought, the water level is low, allowing passage without a boat. The walls and floor are covered with algae and slime producing treacherous footing conditions. There are exits to the north, south and east.

north.description: You can see a wide street to the north.

extra_descs.description: Due to the availability of moisture and nutrients, a green, viscous slime has grown and covered everything with a slippery coating. It seems to go out of its way to drip on you.
